# Crown Global Services

> Crown Global Services Pvt Ltd is an SLBFE licensed agency (License No 3065) based in Pitakotte, Sri Lanka, operating since 2014. It provides three services: curated travel and tour packages (worldwide and within Sri Lanka), ethical overseas recruitment and job placement, and study abroad education consultancy.

Contact: 155 B, 1/1, Pagoda Road, Pitakotte, Sri Lanka · +94 11 250 5108 · info@crownglobalservices.com · WhatsApp +94 77 714 1468

## Pages

- [Home](https://crownglobalservices.com/): Overview of travel, recruitment and education services with company stats and testimonials.
- [Tours & Travel](https://crownglobalservices.com/tours/): Ten worldwide tour packages (Bangkok, Malaysia, Myanmar, Seychelles, Maldives, Thirupathi, Singapore + Malaysia, UAE, Japan, China) plus customized trips, air ticketing, hotel booking and corporate travel.
- [Explore Sri Lanka](https://crownglobalservices.com/tourssl/): Ten curated Sri Lanka journeys including the Ramayamaya Trail, Grand Sri Lanka Circuit, honeymoon escapes and an Ayurveda wellness retreat, plus destinations and cultural experiences.
- [Recruitment](https://crownglobalservices.com/recruitment/): SLBFE licensed overseas job placements in Kuwait, Kyrgyzstan, UAE, Japan and Korea with a five step support process from screening to post arrival care.
- [Education](https://crownglobalservices.com/education/): Study abroad consultancy across 14 destinations with counseling, university applications, visa support and IELTS/TOEFL/JLPT preparation.
- [About Us](https://crownglobalservices.com/about/): Company story, SLBFE licensing, vision, values and achievements. Managing Director: Dr. Hasvin Dissanayake.
- [Contact Us](https://crownglobalservices.com/contact/): Inquiry form, address, phone, map and FAQs. Responses within 24 to 48 hours.
- [Blog](https://crownglobalservices.com/blog/): Travel tips, study abroad guidance and global career advice.
